hooks.command: $inp = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $inp.tool_input.command; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; Add-Content -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\.claude\bash-log.txt" -Value "$ts | $cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; exit 0

$inp = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $inp.tool_input.file_path; $root = 'g:\PROJECT\Learning Projects'; if ($f -and !$f.StartsWith($root)) { Write-Output "BLOCKED: Writes outside Learning Projects are not allowed. Path: $f"; exit 1 }; exit 0

$today = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'; $root = 'g:\PROJECT\Learning Projects'; $stateCandidates = @('practices\test-practice\.sdlc-state.json'); $sdlcPath = $null; $workDone = 'Session active'; $gatesChanged = 'none'; $nextStep = 'Check .sdlc-state.json for current stage'; foreach ($sc in $stateCandidates) { $sp = Join-Path $root $sc; if (Test-Path $sp) { try { $st = Get-Content $sp -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $sdlcPath = $st.sdlc_file; $stage = $st.cursor.stage; $hist = $st.history; $lastCleared = if ($hist -and $hist.Count -gt 0) { $h = $hist[-1]; "Stage $($h.stage) ($($h.name)) PASSED $($h.cleared_at)" } else { 'none' }; $workDone = "Cursor at Stage $stage. Last cleared: $lastCleared"; $gatesChanged = if ($hist -and $hist.Count -gt 0) { "Stage $($hist[-1].stage) PASSED" } else { 'none' }; $nextStep = "Call sdlc_init for Stage $stage" } catch {} ; break } }; if (-not $sdlcPath) { $sdlcPath = Join-Path $root 'SDLC_VALIDATION.md' }; if (-not (Test-Path $sdlcPath)) { exit 0 }; $lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines($sdlcPath, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8); $sl2Idx = ($lines | Select-String -Pattern '^## 18\. Session Log').LineNumber - 1; $sl2End = $lines.Count; if ($sl2Idx -ge 0) { for ($j2 = $sl2Idx + 1; $j2 -lt $lines.Count; $j2++) { if ($lines[$j2] -match '^## ') { $sl2End = $j2; break } }; $slRows = $lines[$sl2Idx..($sl2End-1)] | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\|' }; $lastSlRow = if ($slRows) { $slRows[-1] } else { '' }; if ($lastSlRow -match [regex]::Escape($today)) { exit 0 } }; $row = "| $today | $workDone | $gatesChanged | $nextStep |"; $sIdx = ($lines | Select-String -Pattern '^## 18\. Session Log').LineNumber - 1; if ($sIdx -lt 0) { exit 0 }; $insertAt = -1; for ($i = $sIdx; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) { if ($lines[$i] -match '^\|') { $insertAt = $i }; if ($i -gt $sIdx -and $lines[$i] -match '^## ') { break } }; if ($insertAt -lt 0) { exit 0 }; $newLines = $lines[0..$insertAt] + $row + $(if ($insertAt + 1 -lt $lines.Count) { $lines[($insertAt+1)..($lines.Count-1)] } else { @() }); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines($sdlcPath, $newLines, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)); exit 0

$inp = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $inp.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.py$') { if (Get-Command ruff -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & ruff check --fix $f } else { Write-Output 'ruff not installed - skipping Python lint' } }; exit 0

$inp = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $inp.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.sql$') { if (Get-Command sqlfluff -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & sqlfluff fix --dialect ansi $f } else { Write-Output 'sqlfluff not installed - skipping SQL lint' } }; exit 0
